title: araceae
intro: The taxonomical rank of Araceae refers to a family of flowering plants. It is defined as the level at which related plant species are grouped together based on shared characteristics, such as leaf structure and flower morphology. The Araceae family is commonly known as the arum family and includes plants like philodendrons and peace lilies. This rank encompasses a diverse group of plants, ranging from terrestrial to epiphytic species, with many species found in tropical and subtropical regions.
